links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Andes of Venezuela's Trujillo, Mérida, and Táchira states, in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia-Venezuela border, in northern Colombia's isolated Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta, along all three chains of the Colombian Andes, and south through central Ecuador and central Peru into western Santa Cruz Department in Bolivia
